parentPromotion.name: WW_evergreen_pcparent_Spotify_punchcard

attributes.classification.DescriptionText: Enjoy your favorite songs, stories, and shows. Just search on Bing for three days in a 14-day period and enjoy a free, up to three-month Spotify Premium subscription that includes music, audiobooks, and podcasts. Activate this punch card to start your Bing search, and earn Spotify Premium. Terms apply. Subject to availability.
attributes.description: Enjoy up to 3 months, free. Just search on Bing three days.
attributes.legal_text:
Microsoft Rewards members are eligible for up to a free three-month Spotify Premium Individual subscription when you search with Microsoft Bing on Microsoft Edge for 3 days within 14 days of starting the promotion. Offer valid for 1 person/account. Offer redeemable while supplies last. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or cancel this offer at any time.


Spotify terms and conditions:
Individual plan only. 3 month free offer available for new to Spotify Premium users only, offer ends January 21, 2028. 2 month free offer only redeemable by users whose Premium access ended over 30 days ago and who have not redeemed a Spotify welcome back offer in the last 24 months, offer subject to availability. $12.99/month after trial. Cancel anytime. Terms & Conditions apply.
attributes.title: Free trial: Spotify Premium

parentPromotion.title: Free trial: Spotify Premium
parentPromotion.description: Enjoy up to 3 months, free. Just search on Bing three days.

suggestedRewards.title: League of Legends Gift Card—100 RP

description.largeText:
Compete with a global community of millions across multiple battlefields with Riot Games. Redeemable in League of Legends, Teamfight Tactics, Legends of Runeterra and VALORANT.

Limited time while supplies last.

Terms and Conditions: This Riot Games ("RG") Virtual Currency (“VC”) card (this “Card”) permits you to purchase VC to the value of the amount printed on the front of this Card for use only at the Riot Games online stores and Riot Games clients listed at prepaidcards.riotgames.com. Except as required by law, the value of this Card will not be replaced if lost, stolen, destroyed or used without permission. For the full terms and conditions governing the use of this card, please visit prepaidcards.riotgames

© 2022 Riot Games, Inc. LEAGUE OF LEGENDS, TEAMFIGHT TACTICS, LEGENDS OF RUNETERRA, and VALORANT are trademarks, service marks, and/or registered trademarks of Riot Games, Inc.
description.showcaseDescription: Limited time offer while supplies last. Check out this select League of Legends gift card and claim 100 Riot Points.

description.largeText:
Enjoy unlimited access to 9,000+ magazines and newspapers spanning 40+categories—from News and Politics to Entertainment, Travel, Lifestyle, Technology, and more. There’s something for everyone!

Magzter Gold - 3 Months Subscription Terms & Conditions

Microsoft Rewards members are eligible for a three-month Magzter Gold subscription when they redeem the offer through the Microsoft Rewards programme. The offer is available while supplies last and applies exclusively to the Magzter Gold subscription. Magzter’s own terms and conditions also apply.
description.showcaseDescription: Enjoy unlimited access to 9,000+ magazines and newspapers spanning 40+ categories — from News and Politics to Entertainment, Travel, Lifestyle, Technology, and more. There’s something for everyone!

suggestedRewards.title: Candy Crush Gift Card - Gold Bars & 48h Unlimited Lives

description.largeText:
Join millions of players worldwide in Candy Crush Saga! Switch and match your way through sweet, challenging levels in this divine puzzle adventure.

Spend your Gold Bars to sweeten your journey for an even more explosive experience. And as with all Candy Crush Gift Cards, you will also get 48h of unlimited lives.

Candy Crush Gift Card Terms & Conditions
This gift card is provided in the name of and on behalf of King.com Limited. The value of this gift card can only be used once in either Candy Crush Saga or Candy Crush Soda Saga. Redemption requires that you have a supported authentication account (directly with King with your email or via Facebook login only) for such game which is subject to your acceptance of our King Games Terms and Conditions. You must be 13+ to play our games and require parental consent if you are under 18 to create an account. Upon redemption this gift card will credit your game account with an amount of gold bars which will be determined at the time of redemption, giving you the best possible value at that time and has no value outside our game and until its activated. No refund or exchange for cash. No partial redemption is permitted, and this gift card does not expire. Use of our games require internet connection and can be played on compatible devices only. King is not responsible if this gift card is used without your permission or if its lost, stolen, damaged or destroyed. For all applicable terms please check our site Terms, the King Games Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy at https://www.king.com/termsAndConditions and https://www.king.com/privacyPolicy or directly in our games.
description.showcaseTitle: Satisfy your cravings with a Candy Crush gift card
description.showcaseDescription: Redeem points for a Candy Crush gift card worth $3 and get 48 hours of unlimited lives! Have fun playing the sweetest match 3 puzzle game around!

description.largeText:
Use your Amazon.com Gift Card* towards Books, Electronics, Music, and more. The Amazon.com website is the place to find and discover almost anything you want to buy online at a great price.

Microsoft Rewards uses Amazon.com’s click-through button! Just click on the button in the Microsoft Rewards email we send you, log into your Amazon.com account, and your code will already be there -- just waiting for you to click "Apply to Your Account". Once that's done, your reward will be ready to use on Amazon.com. Restrictions apply, see amazon.com/gc-legal

For more information, visit www.amazon.com.

*Amazon.com is not a sponsor of this promotion. Except as required by law, Amazon.com Gift Cards ("GCs") cannot be transferred for value or redeemed for cash. GCs may be used only for purchases of eligible goods on Amazon.com or certain of its affiliated websites. For complete terms and conditions, see www.amazon.com/gc-legal. GCs are issued by ACI Gift Cards, Inc., a Washington corporation. All Amazon ®, ™ & © are IP of Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates. No expiration date or service fees.
description.showcaseDescription: Amazon.com is the place to find and discover almost anything you want to buy online at a great price
